languages.text: {n}Лария одаривает вас долгим, бесцеремонным взглядом, словно присматривается к товару на прилавке.{/n}"Хорошо. Я найду вам применение. Но не заставляйте меня об этом пожалеть".

traits.locale_text: {n}Лария одаривает вас долгим, бесцеремонным взглядом, словно присматривается к товару на прилавке.{/n}"Хорошо. Я найду вам применение. Но не заставляйте меня об этом пожалеть".

languages.text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n} "All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."
languages.original_text: {n}Лария одаривает вас долгим, бесцеремонным взглядом, словно присматривается к товару на прилавке.{/n}"Хорошо. Я найду вам применение. Но не заставляйте меня об этом пожалеть".

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."
{n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."
{n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅望着你，那毫不遮掩的目光久久停留，已然越过了礼节的边界，仿佛在仔细打量商店里的货物。{/n}“好吧，我会让你派上用场，但别让我后悔。”
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅望着你，那毫不遮掩的目光久久停留，已然越过了礼节的边界，仿佛在仔细打量商店里的货物。{/n}“好吧，我会让你派上用场，但别让我后悔。”

languages.text: {n}Laria vous observe, et son regard franc s'attarde sur vous plus longuement que le permet la bienséance, comme si elle scrutait à la loupe des articles exposés dans une vitrine.{/n} « Entendu. Je trouverai bien de quoi vous occuper. Mais tâchez de ne pas me le faire regretter. »
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria vous observe, et son regard franc s'attarde sur vous plus longuement que le permet la bienséance, comme si elle scrutait à la loupe des articles exposés dans une vitrine.{/n} « Entendu. Je trouverai bien de quoi vous occuper. Mais tâchez de ne pas me le faire regretter. »

languages.text: {n}Laria sana bakıyor, niyetini gizleyemeyen bakışları edep sınırını aşarak sanki dükkândan mal alacakmış gibi her zerreni incelemeye başlıyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ. Size uygun bir iş bulacağım. Sakın yüzümü kara çıkarmayın."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria sana bakıyor, niyetini gizleyemeyen bakışları edep sınırını aşarak sanki dükkândan mal alacakmış gibi her zerreni incelemeye başlıyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ. Size uygun bir iş bulacağım. Sakın yüzümü kara çıkarmayın."

languages.text: {n}Laria te lanza una mirada franca más atenta de lo que permite el decoro, como si examinara los artículos de una tienda.{/n} «De acuerdo. Le encontraré un uso, pero no haga que me arrepienta de esto».
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria te lanza una mirada franca más atenta de lo que permite el decoro, como si examinara los artículos de una tienda.{/n} «De acuerdo. Le encontraré un uso, pero no haga que me arrepienta de esto».

languages.text: {n}Laria sieht dich an. Ihr freimütiger Blick ist bar jeder Etikette, als würde sie die Waren in einem Laden begutachten.{/n} "Also schön. Ich werde eine Verwendung für Euch finden. Hoffentlich bereue ich das nicht."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n}"All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria sieht dich an. Ihr freimütiger Blick ist bar jeder Etikette, als würde sie die Waren in einem Laden begutachten.{/n}"Also schön. Ich werde eine Verwendung für Euch finden. Hoffentlich bereue ich das nicht."

languages.text:
{n}ラリアはあなたを見つめ、礼儀に反して長く見つめ続ける。まるで店に並んだ商品を吟味しているかのようだ。{/n}
「わかった。君に役立ててみせる。でも、後悔させないようにね。」
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks at you, her frank gaze lingering past the point of decorum, as if she were scrutinising wares in a shop.{/n} "All right. I shall find a use for you. But don't make me regret it."

traits.locale_text:
{n}ラリアはあなたを見つめ、礼儀に反して長く見つめ続ける。まるで店に並んだ商品を吟味しているかのようだ。{/n}
「わかった。君に役立ててみせる。でも、後悔させないようにね。」
